info.name: Amazon MQ Demo
info.description:
Collection for testing the Amazon MQ Demo API.

Endpoints:
- Health Check
- Create Order
- List Orders
- Create Batch Orders
- Queue Statistics

request.description: Check if the API and RabbitMQ connection are healthy.
Create a new order. The order will be published to the RabbitMQ queue.

Create a TEST order that can be identified and deleted in QueueExplorer.

This order has:
- email: test@test.com
- is_test: true

You can filter by these in QueueExplorer to find and delete test orders.

Create multiple test orders at once.

Useful for:
- Populating the queue quickly
- Demonstrating batch operations
- Testing QueueExplorer search functionality

List orders created in this session.

Note: This shows orders from API memory, not from the queue.
To see queue contents, use QueueExplorer or the Queue Stats endpoint.

Get statistics about the RabbitMQ queue.

Shows:
- Number of messages in queue
- Number of consumers
- Connection information
Create an EXPRESS order with special handling notes.
